S STRING
C ["SET", "s:k", "v"] -> "+OK"
C ["GET", "s:k"] -> "$v"
C ["GET", "s:missing"] -> "$-1"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v2", "XX"] -> "+OK"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v3", "NX"] -> "$-1"
C ["GET", "s:k"] -> "$v2"
C ["SET", "s:new", "v", "NX"] -> "+OK"
C ["SET", "s:missing2", "v", "XX"] -> "$-1"
C ["GET", "s:missing2"] -> "$-1"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v4", "GET"] -> "$v2"
C ["SET", "s:g", "v", "GET"] -> "$-1"
C ["GET", "s:g"] -> "$v"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v", "EX", "100"] -> "+OK"
C ["TTL", "s:k"] -> ":100"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v5", "KEEPTTL"] -> "+OK"
C ["TTL", "s:k"] -> ":100"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v6"] -> "+OK"
C ["TTL", "s:k"] -> ":-1"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v", "PX", "100000"] -> "+OK"
C ["TTL", "s:k"] -> ":100"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v", "EXAT", "9999999999"] -> "+OK"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v", "PXAT", "9999999999000"] -> "+OK"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v", "EX", "0"] -> "-ERR invalid expire time in 'set' command"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v", "EX", "notanum"] -> "-ERR value is not an integer or out of range"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v", "BOGUS"] -> "-ERR syntax error"
C ["SET", "s:k"] -> "-ERR wrong number of arguments for 'set' command"
C ["SETNX", "s:nx", "v"] -> ":1"
C ["SETNX", "s:nx", "w"] -> ":0"
C ["GET", "s:nx"] -> "$v"
C ["SETEX", "s:se", "100", "v"] -> "+OK"
C ["TTL", "s:se"] -> ":100"
C ["SETEX", "s:se", "0", "v"] -> "-ERR invalid expire time in 'setex' command"
C ["PSETEX", "s:pse", "100000", "v"] -> "+OK"
C ["TTL", "s:pse"] -> ":100"
C ["PSETEX", "s:pse", "0", "v"] -> "-ERR invalid expire time in 'psetex' command"
C ["GETDEL", "s:nx"] -> "$v"
C ["GET", "s:nx"] -> "$-1"
C ["GETDEL", "s:missing"] -> "$-1"
C ["GETEX", "s:se"] -> "$v"
C ["TTL", "s:se"] -> ":100"
C ["GETEX", "s:se", "PERSIST"] -> "$v"
C ["TTL", "s:se"] -> ":-1"
C ["GETEX", "s:se", "EX", "50"] -> "$v"
C ["TTL", "s:se"] -> ":50"
C ["GETEX", "s:se", "EX", "0"] -> "-ERR invalid expire time in 'getex' command"
C ["GETEX", "s:se", "BOGUS"] -> "-ERR syntax error"
C ["GETEX", "s:missing"] -> "$-1"
C ["STRLEN", "s:k"] -> ":1"
C ["STRLEN", "s:missing"] -> ":0"
C ["SET", "s:r", "Hello World"] -> "+OK"
C ["GETRANGE", "s:r", "0", "4"] -> "$Hello"
C ["GETRANGE", "s:r", "-5", "-1"] -> "$World"
C ["GETRANGE", "s:r", "0", "-1"] -> "$Hello World"
C ["GETRANGE", "s:r", "6", "3"] -> "$"
C ["GETRANGE", "s:r", "50", "100"] -> "$"
C ["GETRANGE", "s:r", "-100", "-50"] -> "$H"
C ["GETRANGE", "s:missing", "0", "-1"] -> "$"
C ["GETRANGE", "s:r", "x", "1"] -> "-ERR value is not an integer or out of range"
C ["SUBSTR", "s:r", "0", "4"] -> "$Hello"
C ["APPEND", "s:app", "abc"] -> ":3"
C ["APPEND", "s:app", "def"] -> ":6"
C ["GET", "s:app"] -> "$abcdef"
C ["SETRANGE", "s:sr", "5", "hello"] -> ":10"
C ["GET", "s:sr"] -> "$\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000hello"
C ["SETRANGE", "s:sr", "0", "XY"] -> ":10"
C ["GET", "s:sr"] -> "$XY\u0000\u0000\u0000hello"
C ["SETRANGE", "s:empty", "0", ""] -> ":0"
C ["GET", "s:empty"] -> "$-1"
C ["SETRANGE", "s:sr", "-1", "x"] -> "-ERR offset is out of range"
C ["SETRANGE", "s:big", "536870911", "xx"] -> "-ERR string exceeds maximum allowed size (proto-max-bulk-len)"
C ["INCR", "s:ctr"] -> ":1"
C ["INCRBY", "s:ctr", "41"] -> ":42"
C ["DECR", "s:ctr"] -> ":41"
C ["DECRBY", "s:ctr", "40"] -> ":1"
C ["SET", "s:ctr2", "9223372036854775807"] -> "+OK"
C ["INCR", "s:ctr2"] -> "-ERR increment or decrement would overflow"
C ["DECRBY", "s:ctr2", "-1"] -> "-ERR increment or decrement would overflow"
C ["SET", "s:ctr3", "notanint"] -> "+OK"
C ["INCR", "s:ctr3"] -> "-ERR value is not an integer or out of range"
C ["SET", "s:ctr4", " 11"] -> "+OK"
C ["INCR", "s:ctr4"] -> "-ERR value is not an integer or out of range"
C ["SET", "s:ctr5", "011"] -> "+OK"
C ["INCR", "s:ctr5"] -> "-ERR value is not an integer or out of range"
C ["INCRBY", "s:ctr", "x"] -> "-ERR value is not an integer or out of range"
C ["INCRBYFLOAT", "s:f", "10.5"] -> "$10.5"
C ["INCRBYFLOAT", "s:f", "0.25"] -> "$10.75"
C ["INCRBYFLOAT", "s:f", "-5"] -> "$5.75"
C ["GET", "s:f"] -> "$5.75"
C ["SET", "s:f2", "5.0e3"] -> "+OK"
C ["INCRBYFLOAT", "s:f2", "200"] -> "$5200"
C ["INCRBYFLOAT", "s:f2", "x"] -> "-ERR value is not a valid float"
C ["SET", "s:f3", "abc"] -> "+OK"
C ["INCRBYFLOAT", "s:f3", "1"] -> "-ERR value is not a valid float"
C ["MSET", "s:m1", "a", "s:m2", "b"] -> "+OK"
C ["MGET", "s:m1", "s:m2", "s:missing"] -> ["$a", "$b", "$-1"]
C ["MSET", "s:m1"] -> "-ERR wrong number of arguments for 'mset' command"
C ["MSET", "s:m1", "a", "s:m2"] -> "-ERR wrong number of arguments for 'mset' command"
C ["MSETNX", "s:n1", "a", "s:n2", "b"] -> ":1"
C ["MSETNX", "s:n2", "c", "s:n3", "d"] -> ":0"
C ["MGET", "s:n1", "s:n2", "s:n3"] -> ["$a", "$b", "$-1"]
C ["OBJECT", "ENCODING", "s:ctr"] -> "$int"
C ["SET", "s:emb", "short"] -> "+OK"
C ["OBJECT", "ENCODING", "s:emb"] -> "$embstr"
C ["SET", "s:emb44", "xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"] -> "+OK"
C ["OBJECT", "ENCODING", "s:emb44"] -> "$embstr"
C ["SET", "s:emb45", "xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"] -> "+OK"
C ["OBJECT", "ENCODING", "s:emb45"] -> "$raw"
C ["SET", "s:negz", "-0"] -> "+OK"
C ["OBJECT", "ENCODING", "s:negz"] -> "$embstr"
C ["OBJECT", "ENCODING", "s:missing"] -> "$-1"
C ["TYPE", "s:k"] -> "+string"
C ["TYPE", "s:missing"] -> "+none"
C ["SET", "s:lcs1", "ohmytext"] -> "+OK"
C ["SET", "s:lcs2", "mynewtext"] -> "+OK"
C ["LCS", "s:lcs1", "s:lcs2"] -> "$mytext"
C ["LCS", "s:lcs1", "s:lcs2", "LEN"] -> ":6"
C ["LCS", "s:lcs1", "s:lcs2", "IDX", "MINMATCHLEN", "4", "WITHMATCHLEN"] -> ["$matches", [[[":4", ":7"], [":5", ":8"], ":4"]], "$len", ":6"]
S BITMAP
C ["SETBIT", "b:k", "7", "1"] -> ":0"
C ["GETBIT", "b:k", "7"] -> ":1"
C ["GETBIT", "b:k", "100"] -> ":0"
C ["SETBIT", "b:k", "7", "0"] -> ":1"
C ["SETBIT", "b:k", "7", "2"] -> "-ERR bit is not an integer or out of range"
C ["SETBIT", "b:k", "-1", "1"] -> "-ERR bit offset is not an integer or out of range"
C ["SETBIT", "b:k", "4294967296", "1"] -> "-ERR bit offset is not an integer or out of range"
C ["GETBIT", "b:missing", "0"] -> ":0"
C ["SET", "b:s", "foobar"] -> "+OK"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:s"] -> ":26"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:s", "0", "0"] -> ":4"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:s", "1", "1"] -> ":6"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:s", "0", "-5"] -> ":10"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:s", "0", "-50"] -> ":4"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:s", "0", "5", "BYTE"] -> ":26"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:s", "5", "30", "BIT"] -> ":17"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:missing"] -> ":0"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:s", "0"] -> "-ERR syntax error"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:s", "0", "1", "BOGUS"] -> "-ERR syntax error"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:s", "x", "1"] -> "-ERR value is not an integer or out of range"
C ["BITPOS", "b:s", "1"] -> ":1"
C ["BITPOS", "b:s", "1", "0", "-50"] -> ":1"
C ["SET", "b:z", "\u0000\u00ff\u00f0"] -> "+OK"
C ["BITPOS", "b:z", "1", "0"] -> ":8"
C ["BITPOS", "b:z", "1", "2"] -> ":16"
C ["BITPOS", "b:z", "1", "0", "-1", "BIT"] -> ":8"
C ["SET", "b:ones", "\u00ff\u00ff\u00ff"] -> "+OK"
C ["BITPOS", "b:ones", "0"] -> ":24"
C ["BITPOS", "b:ones", "0", "0", "-1"] -> ":-1"
C ["BITPOS", "b:ones", "0", "0", "-1", "BIT"] -> ":-1"
C ["BITPOS", "b:missing", "1"] -> ":-1"
C ["BITPOS", "b:missing", "0"] -> ":0"
C ["BITPOS", "b:s", "2"] -> "-ERR The bit argument must be 1 or 0."
C ["BITFIELD", "bf:k", "SET", "u8", "0", "255", "GET", "u8", "0"] -> [":0", ":255"]
C ["BITFIELD", "bf:k", "INCRBY", "u8", "0", "10"] -> [":9"]
C ["BITFIELD", "bf:k", "OVERFLOW", "SAT", "INCRBY", "u8", "0", "250"] -> [":255"]
C ["BITFIELD", "bf:k", "OVERFLOW", "FAIL", "INCRBY", "u8", "0", "10"] -> ["$-1"]
C ["BITFIELD", "bf:k", "GET", "i8", "0"] -> [":-1"]
C ["BITFIELD", "bf:k", "GET", "u8", "#1"] -> [":0"]
C ["BITFIELD", "bf:k", "SET", "u64", "0", "1"] -> "-ERR Invalid bitfield type. Use something like i16 u8. Note that u64 is not supported but i64 is."
C ["BITFIELD", "bf:k", "SET", "u8", "0"] -> "-ERR syntax error"
C ["BITFIELD", "bf:k", "OVERFLOW", "BOGUS", "GET", "u8", "0"] -> "-ERR Invalid OVERFLOW type specified"
C ["BITFIELD", "bf:missing", "GET", "u16", "0"] -> [":0"]
C ["BITFIELD_RO", "bf:k", "GET", "u8", "0"] -> [":255"]
C ["BITFIELD_RO", "bf:k", "SET", "u8", "0", "1"] -> "-ERR BITFIELD_RO only supports the GET subcommand"
C ["SET", "b:x", "abc"] -> "+OK"
C ["SET", "b:y", "abd"] -> "+OK"
C ["BITOP", "AND", "b:dand", "b:x", "b:y"] -> ":3"
C ["GET", "b:dand"] -> "$ab`"
C ["BITOP", "OR", "b:dor", "b:x", "b:y"] -> ":3"
C ["GET", "b:dor"] -> "$abg"
C ["BITOP", "XOR", "b:dx", "b:x", "b:y"] -> ":3"
C ["GET", "b:dx"] -> "$\u0000\u0000\u0007"
C ["BITOP", "NOT", "b:dn", "b:x"] -> ":3"
C ["GET", "b:dn"] -> "$\u009e\u009d\u009c"
C ["BITOP", "NOT", "b:dn", "b:x", "b:y"] -> "-ERR BITOP NOT must be called with a single source key."
C ["BITOP", "BOGUS", "b:d", "b:x"] -> "-ERR syntax error"
C ["BITOP", "XOR", "b:dz", "b:missing1", "b:missing2"] -> ":0"
C ["GET", "b:dz"] -> "$-1"
C ["SET", "b:short", "ab"] -> "+OK"
C ["BITOP", "XOR", "b:dxl", "b:x", "b:short"] -> ":3"
C ["GET", "b:dxl"] -> "$\u0000\u0000c"
S HLL
C ["PFADD", "h:a", "x", "y", "z"] -> ":1"
C ["PFCOUNT", "h:a"] -> ":3"
C ["PFADD", "h:b", "y", "z", "w"] -> ":1"
C ["PFMERGE", "h:m", "h:a", "h:b"] -> "+OK"
C ["PFCOUNT", "h:m"] -> ":4"
C ["PFCOUNT", "h:a", "h:b"] -> ":4"
C ["SET", "h:plain", "x"] -> "+OK"
C ["PFCOUNT", "h:plain"] -> "-WRONGTYPE Key is not a valid HyperLogLog string value."
C ["PFADD", "h:plain", "x"] -> "-WRONGTYPE Key is not a valid HyperLogLog string value."
C ["PFDEBUG", "ENCODING", "h:a"] -> "+sparse"
C ["TYPE", "h:a"] -> "+string"
S HASH
C ["HSET", "hs:k", "f1", "v1"] -> ":1"
C ["HSET", "hs:k", "f1", "w", "f2", "v2"] -> ":1"
C ["HGET", "hs:k", "f1"] -> "$w"
C ["HGET", "hs:k", "nofield"] -> "$-1"
C ["HGET", "hs:missing", "f"] -> "$-1"
C ["HSET", "hs:k"] -> "-ERR wrong number of arguments for 'hset' command"
C ["HSET", "hs:k", "f1"] -> "-ERR wrong number of arguments for 'hset' command"
C ["HSETNX", "hs:k", "f1", "x"] -> ":0"
C ["HGET", "hs:k", "f1"] -> "$w"
C ["HSETNX", "hs:k", "f3", "v3"] -> ":1"
C ["HMSET", "hs:k", "f4", "v4", "f5", "v5"] -> "+OK"
C ["HMGET", "hs:k", "f1", "f4", "nofield"] -> ["$w", "$v4", "$-1"]
C ["HMGET", "hs:missing", "a", "b"] -> ["$-1", "$-1"]
C ["HEXISTS", "hs:k", "f1"] -> ":1"
C ["HEXISTS", "hs:k", "nofield"] -> ":0"
C ["HEXISTS", "hs:missing", "f"] -> ":0"
C ["HSTRLEN", "hs:k", "f1"] -> ":1"
C ["HSTRLEN", "hs:k", "nofield"] -> ":0"
C ["HSTRLEN", "hs:missing", "f"] -> ":0"
C ["HLEN", "hs:k"] -> ":5"
C ["HLEN", "hs:missing"] -> ":0"
C ["HDEL", "hs:k", "f4", "f5", "nofield"] -> ":2"
C ["HLEN", "hs:k"] -> ":3"
C ["TYPE", "hs:k"] -> "+hash"
C ["OBJECT", "ENCODING", "hs:k"] -> "$listpack"
C ["HSET", "hs:d", "a", "1", "b", "2"] -> ":2"
C ["HDEL", "hs:d", "a", "b"] -> ":2"
C ["HLEN", "hs:d"] -> ":0"
C ["TYPE", "hs:d"] -> "+none"
C ["HSET", "hs:e", "", ""] -> ":1"
C ["HGET", "hs:e", ""] -> "$"
C ["HSTRLEN", "hs:e", ""] -> ":0"
C ["HDEL", "hs:e", ""] -> ":1"
C ["HSET", "hs:n", "cnt", "10"] -> ":1"
C ["HINCRBY", "hs:n", "cnt", "5"] -> ":15"
C ["HINCRBY", "hs:n", "cnt", "-20"] -> ":-5"
C ["HINCRBY", "hs:n", "fresh", "3"] -> ":3"
C ["HINCRBY", "hs:newn", "f", "2"] -> ":2"
C ["HGET", "hs:newn", "f"] -> "$2"
C ["HSET", "hs:n", "txt", "abc"] -> ":1"
C ["HINCRBY", "hs:n", "txt", "1"] -> "-ERR hash value is not an integer"
C ["HINCRBY", "hs:n", "cnt", "notanum"] -> "-ERR value is not an integer or out of range"
C ["HSET", "hs:n", "big", "9223372036854775807"] -> ":1"
C ["HINCRBY", "hs:n", "big", "1"] -> "-ERR increment or decrement would overflow"
C ["HINCRBYFLOAT", "hs:n", "fl", "10.5"] -> "$10.5"
C ["HINCRBYFLOAT", "hs:n", "fl", "0.25"] -> "$10.75"
C ["HINCRBYFLOAT", "hs:n", "fl", "-0.75"] -> "$10"
C ["HINCRBYFLOAT", "hs:n", "fl", "5.0e3"] -> "$5010"
C ["HINCRBYFLOAT", "hs:n", "txt", "1"] -> "-ERR hash value is not a float"
C ["HINCRBYFLOAT", "hs:n", "fl", "notanum"] -> "-ERR value is not a valid float"
C ["HSET", "hs:it", "a", "1", "b", "2", "c", "3"] -> ":3"
C ["HGETALL", "hs:it"] -> ["$a", "$1", "$b", "$2", "$c", "$3"]
C ["HKEYS", "hs:it"] -> ["$a", "$b", "$c"]
C ["HVALS", "hs:it"] -> ["$1", "$2", "$3"]
C ["HGETALL", "hs:missing"] -> []
C ["HKEYS", "hs:missing"] -> []
C ["HVALS", "hs:missing"] -> []
C ["HSET", "hs:it", "a", "9"] -> ":0"
C ["HGETALL", "hs:it"] -> ["$a", "$9", "$b", "$2", "$c", "$3"]
C ["HDEL", "hs:it", "b"] -> ":1"
C ["HGETALL", "hs:it"] -> ["$a", "$9", "$c", "$3"]
C ["HSET", "hs:it", "b", "5"] -> ":1"
C ["HGETALL", "hs:it"] -> ["$a", "$9", "$c", "$3", "$b", "$5"]
C ["HRANDFIELD", "hs:missing"] -> "$-1"
C ["HRANDFIELD", "hs:missing", "3"] -> []
C ["HSET", "hs:one", "solo", "val"] -> ":1"
C ["HRANDFIELD", "hs:one"] -> "$solo"
C ["HRANDFIELD", "hs:one", "5"] -> ["$solo"]
C ["HRANDFIELD", "hs:one", "-3"] -> ["$solo", "$solo", "$solo"]
C ["HRANDFIELD", "hs:one", "2", "WITHVALUES"] -> ["$solo", "$val"]
C ["HRANDFIELD", "hs:one", "0"] -> []
C ["HSCAN", "hs:it", "0"] -> ["$0", ["$a", "$9", "$c", "$3", "$b", "$5"]]
C ["HSCAN", "hs:it", "0", "NOVALUES"] -> ["$0", ["$a", "$c", "$b"]]
C ["HSCAN", "hs:it", "0", "MATCH", "a*"] -> ["$0", ["$a", "$9"]]
C ["HSCAN", "hs:it", "0", "COUNT", "100"] -> ["$0", ["$a", "$9", "$c", "$3", "$b", "$5"]]
C ["HSCAN", "hs:it", "42"] -> ["$0", ["$a", "$9", "$c", "$3", "$b", "$5"]]
C ["HSCAN", "hs:missing", "0"] -> ["$0", []]
C ["HSET", "hs:big", "f000", "v000xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx", "f001", "v002xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx", "f003", "v003xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx", "f004", "v005xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx", "f006", "v023xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx", "f024", C ["OBJECT", "ENCODING", "hs:big"] -> "$hashtable"
C ["HLEN", "hs:big"] -> ":30"
C ["HGET", "hs:big", "f010"] -> "$v010xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"
C ["HSET", "hs:x", "a", "va", "b", "vb"] -> ":2"
C ["HGETEX", "hs:x", "FIELDS", "2", "a", "nofield"] -> ["$va", "$-1"]
C ["HGETEX", "hs:x", "PXAT", "9999999999000", "FIELDS", "1", "a"] -> ["$va"]
C ["HPEXPIRETIME", "hs:x", "FIELDS", "2", "a", "b"] -> [":9999999999000", ":-1"]
C ["HGETEX", "hs:x", "PERSIST", "FIELDS", "1", "a"] -> ["$va"]
C ["HTTL", "hs:x", "FIELDS", "1", "a"] -> [":-1"]
C ["HGETEX", "hs:x", "EX", "100", "FIELDS", "1", "a"] -> ["$va"]
C ["HTTL", "hs:x", "FIELDS", "1", "a"] -> [":100"]
C ["HGETEX", "hs:x", "EX", "notanum", "FIELDS", "1", "a"] -> "-ERR value is not an integer or out of range"
C ["HGETDEL", "hs:x", "FIELDS", "2", "b", "nofield"] -> ["$vb", "$-1"]
C ["HEXISTS", "hs:x", "b"] -> ":0"
C ["HGETDEL", "hs:x", "FIELDS", "1", "a"] -> ["$va"]
C ["TYPE", "hs:x"] -> "+none"
C ["HSET", "hs:t", "f1", "v1", "f2", "v2"] -> ":2"
C ["HEXPIRE", "hs:missing", "100", "FIELDS", "1", "f"] -> [":-2"]
C ["HTTL", "hs:missing", "FIELDS", "1", "f"] -> [":-2"]
C ["HPERSIST", "hs:missing", "FIELDS", "1", "f"] -> [":-2"]
C ["HEXPIRE", "hs:t", "100", "FIELDS", "2", "f1", "nofield"] -> [":1", ":-2"]
C ["HTTL", "hs:t", "FIELDS", "3", "f1", "f2", "nofield"] -> [":100", ":-1", ":-2"]
C ["HPTTL", "hs:t", "FIELDS", "2", "f2", "nofield"] -> [":-1", ":-2"]
C ["OBJECT", "ENCODING", "hs:t"] -> "$listpackex"
C ["HPERSIST", "hs:t", "FIELDS", "2", "f1", "f2"] -> [":1", ":-1"]
C ["HEXPIREAT", "hs:t", "9999999999", "FIELDS", "1", "f1"] -> [":1"]
C ["HEXPIRETIME", "hs:t", "FIELDS", "2", "f1", "f2"] -> [":9999999999", ":-1"]
C ["HPEXPIREAT", "hs:t", "9999999999000", "FIELDS", "1", "f1"] -> [":1"]
C ["HPEXPIRETIME", "hs:t", "FIELDS", "1", "f1"] -> [":9999999999000"]
